inventory.title: Anomaly Detection Filter
inventory.description: Flags inconsistent naming and one-off identity artifacts across discovered accounts.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Contact Canonicalizer
inventory.description: Normalizes and deduplicates email/phone artifacts into canonical forms.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Disclosure Readiness Filter
inventory.description: Assesses whether targets expose clear and structured vulnerability disclosure channels.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Entity Name Resolver
inventory.description: Extracts likely full-name entities from biography snippets and profile descriptions.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Exposure Tier Matrix
inventory.description: Assigns low/medium/high exposure tiers based on extracted artifacts and findings.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Mailbox Provider Profiler
inventory.description: Separates public/free mailbox providers from custom domains in contact artifacts.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Noise Suppression Filter
inventory.description: Marks low-signal rows and placeholder artifacts to improve scan readability.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: PII Signal Classifier
inventory.description: Classifies extracted artifacts into personal data classes for analyst triage.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Sensitive Lexicon Guard
inventory.description: Flags sensitive personal-information phrases in bios and profile context text.
inventory.author: Silica-X

inventory.title: Takeover Priority Filter
inventory.description: Prioritizes takeover-prone assets so analysts can triage high-impact surface risk first.
inventory.author: Silica-X
